summary: Completed Stages 4-6 testing for CrickPredict PWA. All 26 backend API tests passed. Frontend auth flow, navigation, and all pages working correctly.

issues: ESLint warning: useEffect missing dependency 'fetchContests' - minor code quality issue

passed_tests: GET /api/user/profile - returns user profile with all fields
GET /api/user/rank-progress - returns rank info with progress percent
GET /api/user/referral-stats - returns referral code and count
GET /api/wallet/balance - returns balance and daily status
POST /api/wallet/claim-daily - claims daily reward or rejects if already claimed
GET /api/admin/templates/{id} - returns template with resolved questions
GET /api/matches/{id} - returns match detail with contests count
Security headers present (X-Request-ID, X-Response-Time, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options)
Frontend: Home page shows 7 real matches from API
Frontend: Match detail page with back button and contests
Frontend: Wallet page with balance (10,500), daily reward, transactions
Frontend: Profile page with rank progress, referral code, logout
Frontend: Bottom navigation works across all tabs
critical_code_review_comments: MatchDetailPage.jsx line 20: useEffect has missing dependency 'fetchContests' - add to dependency array or use useCallback
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data (72 questions, 7 templates, 6 matches, 3 contests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stages 4-6 complete. All User Profile, Wallet, Admin Questions/Templates, and Match Management APIs working. Frontend shows real matches from API. Test user has 10,500 coins (10,000 signup + 500 daily reward). Daily reward already claimed for today. 72 questions across 7 categories, 7 templates, 6 matches with 3 contests seeded. My Contests page is a placeholder for Stage 7.
